homepage.text_excerpt: Homepage - Diocese of Manchester Skip to content Directory Safeguarding Find a Church Vacancies Contact Donate Our Diocese About Us Learn more about who we are, the people behind our mission, and how our diocese is structured and supported. Our Vision Our shared goals and priorities for the future of the diocese. What’s On News & Events from across our Diocese About Us Information about our Bishops, structures, vision and strategy. Bishops Meet our bishops and discover their leadership, ministry, and role in guiding our diocese. Archdeacons Find out more about our the ministry of our three Archdeacons. Our Structure Understand the roles and responsibilities of senior clergy and how our diocese is organised. Our Staff Get to know the dedicated team supporting our churches, parishes, and wider communities. Governance Find out how decisions are made and who provides oversight across our operations. Registry Find out about the registry which provides support for legal matters and queries within our diocese. Our Schools Learn about our church schools and their vital role in shaping lives and supporting our mission. Cathedral Discover more about Manchester Cathedral – a place of history, prayer, and community. Parish Records Access guidance on managing, storing, and retrieving parish records. Our Vision Our Vision for 2030, including Growing Younger, Church Planting and Revitalisation, Developing Missional Leaders, and Parish Renewal. Parish Renewal Working closely with our parishes to understand the opportunities and challenges they face and make sure they have access to the support they need. Growing Younger Engaging with children, young people, and their families across the diocese, with a particular focus on strengthening the links between our churches and church schools. Church Planting & Revitalisation Establishing mission-focused churches across the diocese especially in communities where attendance is low. Developing Missional Leaders Investing in our clergy, developing our lay people and supporting vocations so we develop missional leaders with the calling and skills to grow our churches. Net Zero Carbon Collaborating with our churches and schools as they measure their energy use and take practical steps to reduce their carbon footprint. Racial Justice Supporting Global Majority Heritage communities and ensuring our clergy and lay leaders represent the diversity of our diocese Disability Friendly Continuing our commitment to accessibility and inclusion, ensuring that people with disabilities are welcomed, supported and able to participate fully in the life of our churches, chaplaincies and schools. What’s On News Stay informed with the latest stories and updates from across the diocese. Events Explore upcoming gatherings, services and opportunities to connect. Notices Important announcements about those ministering within our diocese. Films & Photos Browse highlights from recent events and activities. Podcasts Listen to inspiring talks, interviews, and reflections. Thought for the Day Short reflections to encourage and uplift your day. Our Diocese Manchester Diocese serves a vibrant, dynamic and creative community in the North West of England. Read more Faith and Calling Vocations Exploring where God may be calling you in life and ministry. Exploring Faith Learn more about the Christian faith. Life Events Guidance and support for key moments in life’s journey. Vocations What is My Calling? Helping you discern your gifts and direction in life. Lay Ministries Information and resources to help authorised and licensed lay ministers in their ministry and mission Considering Ordination I think God may be calling me to serve as an ordained minister – so now what? What next? Exploring Faith Find a Church Locate a church near you to worship and connect. Prayer Community Join with others in prayer for our world and our Church. Discipleship Resources Tools and guides to help you grow in faith. Church Calendar Key dates and seasons in

campaigns.title: Parish Renewal
campaigns.summary: At the heart of this support is our commitment to parish renewal , providing specialist, practical help to ensure the missional and financial sustainability of our parishes. This includes financial support for those wishing to establish New Worshipping Communities. Our aim is to ensure that every parish is equipped to thrive and serve its local community.

campaigns.title: Growing Younger
campaigns.summary: We are deepening our commitment to growing younger , nurturing children and young people on their discipleship journey. Building on the success of the Places Project in Bolton and the Man Dio Growing Faith programme across the rest of our diocese, the Encounter Project will provide additional children’s and youth workers, while the Equip training initiative will support lay and ordained leaders so they grow in confidence and develop their skills in ministry with children and young people.

campaigns.title: Church Planting and Revitalisation
campaigns.summary: Alongside this, we are focused on church planting and revitalisation through strengthened partnerships with our existing resource churches and the Antioch Network. Six new resource churches representing a range of traditions will also be established and supported in planting new churches over the next eight years.

campaigns.title: Developing Missional Leaders
campaigns.summary: We are building on the work that is already taking place to bring forward and develop the next generations of missional ordained and lay leaders at every stage of their vocation, including a new, diverse generation of leaders equipped to grow faith communities.

campaigns.title: Find us
campaigns.summary: The Church of England Diocese of Manchester St. John’s House 155-163 The Rock Bury, BL9 0ND

Our Vision Our shared goals and priorities for the future of the diocese. What’s On News & Events from across our Diocese About Us Information about our Bishops, structures, vision and strategy. Bishops Meet our bishops and discover their leadership, ministry, and role in guiding our diocese. Archdeacons Find out more about our the ministry of our three Archdeacons. Our Structure Understand the roles and responsibilities of senior clergy and how our diocese is organised. Registry Find out about the registry which provides support for legal matters and queries within our diocese. Our Schools Learn about our church schools and their vital role in shaping lives and supporting our mission. Cathedral Discover more about Manchester Cathedral – a place of history, prayer, and community. Parish Records Access guidance on managing, storing, and retrieving parish records. Our Vision Our Vision for 2030, including Growing Younger, Church Planting and Revitalisation, Developing Missional Leaders, and Parish Renewal. Church Planting & Revitalisation Establishing mission-focused churches across the diocese especially in communities where attendance is low. Net Zero Carbon Collaborating with our churches and schools as they measure their energy use and take practical steps to reduce their carbon footprint. Racial Justice Supporting Global Majority Heritage communities and ensuring our clergy and lay leaders represent the diversity of our diocese Disability Friendly Continuing our commitment to accessibility and inclusion, ensuring that people with disabilities are welcomed, supported and able to participate fully in the life of our churches, chaplaincies and schools. Our Diocese
About Us Learn more about who we are, the people behind our mission, and how our diocese is structured and supported.
Our Vision Our shared goals and priorities for the future of the diocese.
What’s On News & Events from across our Diocese
Bishops Meet our bishops and discover their leadership, ministry, and role in guiding our diocese.
Archdeacons Find out more about our the ministry of our three Archdeacons.
Our Structure Understand the roles and responsibilities of senior clergy and how our diocese is organised.
Our Staff Get to know the dedicated team supporting our churches, parishes, and wider communities.
Governance Find out how decisions are made and who provides oversight across our operations.
Registry Find out about the registry which provides support for legal matters and queries within our diocese.
Our Schools Learn about our church schools and their vital role in shaping lives and supporting our mission.
Cathedral Discover more about Manchester Cathedral – a place of history, prayer, and community.
Parish Records Access guidance on managing, storing, and retrieving parish records.
Parish Renewal Working closely with our parishes to understand the opportunities and challenges they face and make sure they have access to the support they need.
Growing Younger Engaging with children, young people, and their families across the diocese, with a particular focus on strengthening the links between our churches and church schools.
Church Planting & Revitalisation Establishing mission-focused churches across the diocese especially in communities where attendance is low.
Developing Missional Leaders Investing in our clergy, developing our lay people and supporting vocations so we develop missional leaders with the calling and skills to grow our churches.
Net Zero Carbon Collaborating with our churches and schools as they measure their energy use and take practical steps to reduce their carbon footprint.
Racial Justice Supporting Global Majority Heritage communities and ensuring our clergy and lay leaders represent the diversity of our diocese
Disability Friendly Continuing our commitment to accessibility and inclusion, ensuring that people with disabilities are welcomed, supported and able to participate fully in the life of our churches,
News Stay informed with the latest stories and updates from across the diocese.
Events Explore upcoming gatherings, services and opportunities to connect.
Notices Important announcements about those ministering within our diocese.
Films & Photos Browse highlights from recent events and activities.
Podcasts Listen to inspiring talks, interviews, and reflections.
Thought for the Day Short reflections to encourage and uplift your day.
Faith and Calling
Vocations Exploring where God may be calling you in life and ministry.
Exploring Faith Learn more about the Christian faith.
Life Events Guidance and support for key moments in life’s journey.
What is My Calling? Helping you discern your gifts and direction in life.
Lay Ministries Information and resources to help authorised and licensed lay ministers in their ministry and mission
Considering Ordination I think God may be calling me to serve as an ordained minister – so now what? What next?
Prayer Community Join with others in prayer for our world and our Church.
Discipleship Resources Tools and guides to help you grow in faith.
Church Calendar Key dates and seasons in the Church year.
Spiritual Companions Support for your spiritual journey from trained guides.
Baptisms Preparing for and understanding the meaning of baptism.
Weddings Getting married in church is meaningful, spiritual, personal, and beautiful.
Funerals Support and guidance for planning a funeral service.
Confirmations Confirmation is a significant milestone in the Christian journey.
Admission to Communion Admission to Communion is a meaningful step that allows children to receive the bread and wine during Holy Communion before Confirmation.
Support
For Parishes Resources and advice for parish leaders and volunteers.
For Schools Guidance and support for our church schools and trusts.
For Clergy Support and resources for clergy across the diocese.
Parish Administration Resources to help your parish keep on top of the various administrative tasks that it needs to fulfil.
Parish Finance Guidance and resources to help parishes handle money with transparency, accountability, and generosity.
Church Officers Information for key parish and school roles.
Giving & Generosity Encouraging and managing giving in your parish.
Children & Young People Supporting ministry with children and families.
Buildings Guidance on maintaining and developing church buildings.
Communications Support for managing parish communications and data.
Grants Funding opportunities for parish projects.
Eucharists Resources for celebrating Holy Communion.
The Board of Education The body overseeing our work with schools and young people.
Our Church Schools & Trusts We educate over 58,000 children and young people every day. Read more about our Church Schools & Trusts.
School Governance Support for school leaders and governors.
School Life Resources for worship, RE, and everyday school life.
Training & Resources Welcome to our Training and Resources hub – designed to equip and empower Church of England schools across the Diocese of Manchester.
Clergy Admin Administrative resources for clergy.
Clergy Wellbeing Support for the health and wellbeing of clergy.
Ministerial Development Training and development for clergy.
Curates Resources and guidance for curates in training.
Property Housing and property support for clergy.
Retired Clergy Support and resources for clergy in retirement.
Self Supporting Ministry Guidance for clergy serving without stipend.
Leading Life Events Resources for conducting weddings, funerals, and more.
Spouses and Civil Partners Information and support for spouses and civil partners of clergy.
Safeguarding Training Safeguarding training for staff and volunteers.
Parish Safeguarding Officer Resources for parish safeguarding officers.
Safer Recruitment Ensuring safe recruitment of staff and volunteers.
Policy and Procedures Our safeguarding policies and how they work.
Parish Safeguarding Dashboards Tools for managing safeguarding in parishes.
Safeguarding Complaints Procedure Documents and resources around our Safeguarding Complaints Procedure
